heading: Contact Us
enrollmentBody:
Priority enrollment for our current families begins January 2nd, and registration opens to the public on February 1st. All open spots are filled on a first come, first served basis.

You'll find tuition rates, the registration form, and GRACE scholarship details on our Enrollment page — or just call the office at (508) 429-5717 and we'll be glad to help.
intro: We would love to hear from you and to welcome your family to Blessed Beginnings. Call the preschool office or send us a message to schedule a tour or ask any questions.
location: located in Christ The King Lutheran Church
